title: Validation returns 422 instead of 400
evidence: lib/book_api/router.ex:32 sends 422 for validation errors; REQUIREMENTS.json how_to_verify mentions 400
suggestion: 422 Unprocessable Entity is arguably more correct for validation, but the spec says 400. Minor discrepancy.

title: Author index added on books table
suggestion: Nice optimisation for the ?author= filter beyond spec requirements.

title: Ecto SQL sandbox for test isolation
evidence: test/support/conn_case.ex — uses Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox for transactional test isolation
suggestion: Best practice for Elixir test suites; keeps tests independent.

title: Configurable port via environment variable
evidence: config/config.exs:12 — PORT env var override; lib/book_api/application.ex:17
suggestion: Goes beyond spec; useful for deployment flexibility.
